brand.name: TYP0stet
brand.description: typo (誤字) と stet (校正記号「生かせ」) を合成した brand 名。失敗を治さず、誇りとして身につけるアパレル。
brand.thesis: 失敗できる事が、人間の証明になる。

products.name: Stet Frend
products.description: TYP0stet の最初の Stet。子どもの頃、誰でも書いた「Friend」の綴り間違い「Frend」を直さず着る T シャツ。砂場で誰にでも『Frend』と言えたあの頃を、いまの胸に。

products.name: Sticker Pack
products.description: 0 monogram / 4:81 / TYP0stet wordmark の 3 種ステッカーセット。マットビニール、屋外耐久。

products.name: Tote — Bone
products.description: 12oz cotton canvas tote bag in unbleached bone, with a small ink-black 0 monogram silk-screen printed at upper-center. A4-portrait silhouette, shoulder-length handles.

products.name: Tote — Ink
products.description: 12oz cotton canvas tote bag in deep ink black, with a small bone-cream 0 monogram silk-screen printed at upper-center. A4-portrait silhouette, shoulder-length handles.

products.name: Knapsack — Olive
products.description: Waxed cotton canvas drawstring knapsack in muted military olive, with a small bone-cream 0 monogram silk-screen printed at upper-center. Lightweight day pack.

products.name: Knapsack — Mint
products.description: Waxed cotton canvas drawstring knapsack in soft mint green, with a small ink-black 0 monogram silk-screen printed at upper-center. Lightweight day pack.

policy.returns: サイズ違い・色違いの返品不可。不良品は到着 7 日以内に info@typostet.com まで。
